name: villa-salty
title: Stylish 3BR Designer Pool Villa in Heart Seminyak
description: A designer tropical hideaway where style meets island living. Escape to Salty Villa, where modern designer style meets tropical Balinese charm. Enjoy a fully enclosed air-conditioned living room and a beautiful private pool for total comfort. Located just 900m from KuDeTa Beach in the heart of Seminyak, you’re steps from Bali’s best cafés, boutiques, beach clubs and nightlife and Seminyak Village Mall. Perfect for friends, couples and families seeking the Seminyak lifestyle.The spaceWelcome to Salty Villa, where modern minimalism meets the soul of Bali — a stylish design vision created by an Italian architect.A carefully crafted space where architecture, natural light and tropical living come together.This 3-bedroom dream retreat was created with care, balancing clean lines, natural textures, and warm island energy. Every space was designed to feel open, elegant, and deeply comfortable — using only high-quality materials, including local woods, natural stone, and premium fixtures.Downstairs, two mirror-image bedrooms open directly to the pool deck. Each features full-height glass walls, oversized tropical rain showers (1.5m x 1.2m), and mini indoor gardens for that magical “outdoor shower” feeling. Step out of bed, and you’re already by the pool.Upstairs, the master bedroom opens to a private terrace — ideal for sunbathing or relaxing in the gazebo-style lounge. All bedrooms include KingKoil king-size mattresses, blackout curtains, and ensuite bathrooms with glass ceilings, letting in soft natural daylight.The living room and kitchen are enclosed, fully air-conditioned, and equipped with a 75” LG 4K Smart TV + Bluetooth sound system, perfect for cozy movie nights. The kitchen is a chef’s dream — with high-end appliances, including a La Germania oven, double-door LG fridge, and an electric stove.Dine at the elegant table overlooking the pool, adjust the electric curtains with one touch, or take an outdoor shower made from antique Ulin wood after a sunny afternoon.Sal
